meaning: n.介绍,传入,初步,导言,绪论,入门
examples: The notes are intended as an introduction to the course.
It's a useful introduction to an extremely complex subject.
The book is a friendly, down-to-earth introduction to physics.
Race days unfurl with an introduction to the day's programme and to the competing teams.
Despite the introduction of cars, the most useful motorised vehicle in Finnish Lapland is the skimobile.
